signals.headline: US Fed Issues Clarity on Tokenized Securities, Boosting Ethereum-Linked RWA Projects | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
US Fed Issues Clarity on Tokenized Securities, Boosting Ethereum-Linked RWA Projects | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]  
Ethereum spot ETFs saw $169M net inflows on Wednesday, the largest in two months, signaling strong institutional demand amid volatility. [1]

signals.headline: IRS and Treasury Approve New Staking Guidance for Ethereum, Enhancing Regulatory Clarity | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
IRS and Treasury Approve New Staking Guidance for Ethereum, Enhancing Regulatory Clarity | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]  
This approval reduces uncertainty for ETH stakers, aligning with rising ETF inflows and positive price momentum (ETH up 2-3.56% to ~$2,300-$2,393 in recent 24h). [2][3][4]
